name: The hills
description:
You see all around you ... hills.  You're lucky you get to get so much
exercise today!  You wonder if you should save your breath and go back west or
continue east toward the hills.  There is a trail leading south towards
a black glassy mountain range.  A small plaque is on the rock.

exits.description: You see the trail along the hills.
You see a black glassy mountain range.
You see the dirty hills still.

extra_descriptions.description:
This extension (hills and dwarf forest) is made my Hatchet for any Merc Mud.
